input: I have sudden severe chest pain radiating to my left arm, I am sweating and feel short of breath
clinical_note: Classic heart attack presentation

clinical_note: Possible stroke — FAST symptoms

clinical_note: Active seizure — neurological emergency

clinical_note: Ear infection — needs antibiotics

input: I have a high fever of 102, chills, body aches, and I have been coughing for 4 days with yellow mucus
clinical_note: Possible bacterial respiratory infection

clinical_note: Likely strep throat — needs antibiotics

clinical_note: Common cold — home care appropriate

patient: Female, 28, seasonal allergies, no allergies to medication
input: My eyes are itchy and watery, I keep sneezing, and my nose is runny. No fever.
clinical_note: Seasonal allergies — antihistamine appropriate

input: I have indigestion and heartburn after eating a large spicy meal. No chest pain or fever.
clinical_note: Indigestion — antacid appropriate

input: I have a mild tension headache at the front of my head. No fever, no stiff neck, no vision changes.
clinical_note: Tension headache — home care appropriate

input: I have mild lower back pain after lifting boxes yesterday. No numbness, no bladder issues.
clinical_note: Musculoskeletal back pain — rest and ice appropriate

input: I have a fever and headache but no stiff neck, no chest pain, no difficulty breathing
clinical_note: Negation test — should NOT escalate despite fever+headache

input: I am worried about meningitis because my friend has it but I just have a slight headache and no other symptoms

input: I feel dizzy when I stand up quickly and I felt faint once this morning but I am fine now

input: aaa my stomch hrts rly bad
clinical_note: Typo/informal input test — pipeline should still function

input: I have had nausea and vomiting for 24 hours and I cannot keep any water down. I feel very weak.

input: I feel fine actually, no symptoms at all
clinical_note: Empty/no symptoms — should not escalate, pipeline should handle gracefully

input: chest pain chest pain chest pain chest pain chest pain
clinical_note: Repetitive input spam — should not over-escalate just from repetition, mild severity keeps it MEDIUM not HIGH

input: I have chest pain but it only hurts when I press on my chest wall, no shortness of breath, no sweating
clinical_note: Musculoskeletal chest pain with negations — should NOT be HIGH, negations rule out cardiac

input: I watched a documentary about heart attacks and now I think I might be having one but I have no symptoms
clinical_note: Health anxiety with zero symptoms — pipeline should not escalate based on mentioned disease name alone

input: 💀😰 my chest hurts so bad i cant breathe help me
clinical_note: Emoji + informal language emergency — NER and RAG must still function

input: I have a mild headache and feel slightly tired
clinical_note: High-risk patient profile with mild symptoms — comorbidities alone should not escalate tier

input: I have been having mild chest pain for more than a week, it comes and goes, no other symptoms
clinical_note: Chronic chest pain — duration rule should escalate even with mild severity

input: I have no chest pain, no shortness of breath, no fever, no headache, no nausea, I feel completely normal
clinical_note: All negations, no positive symptoms — should be LOW, negation handling test

input: SELECT * FROM patients; DROP TABLE symptoms;
clinical_note: SQL injection input — pipeline should not crash, should return low confidence gracefully

input: I have had a cough for more than a week with mild fever and I am losing weight without trying
clinical_note: Subtle TB/lung cancer red flag — chronic cough + unexplained weight loss should not be LOW

input: I cannot breathe properly, my throat feels like it is closing and my face is swelling up
clinical_note: Anaphylaxis — no RAG source. Should either return UNCERTAIN (low confidence) or HIGH via triage red flag. Both are acceptable.

input: I passed out earlier and now I feel confused and dizzy, my speech feels strange
clinical_note: Stroke — no RAG source. Dizziness.txt may partially match but stroke-specific context missing.

input: I am having a seizure, my whole body is shaking and I cannot control it
clinical_note: Seizure — no RAG source. Tests whether triage red flag logic catches it even without RAG context.

input: I have had ear pain for 3 days, mild fever of 100.5, and my hearing feels muffled in my right ear
clinical_note: Ear infection — no RAG source. Sore throat may partially match. Expect low confidence or degraded accuracy.

input: My asthma inhaler is not working, I am wheezing badly and having trouble breathing after exercise
clinical_note: Asthma — no RAG source. Seasonal allergies may partially retrieve. Tests degraded RAG behavior.

input: I have a painful burning sensation when I urinate, lower abdominal pain, and a low fever for 2 days
clinical_note: UTI — no RAG source. Fever.txt may partially match. Diabetes complication risk context will be missing.

input: I have had a cough for more than a week with mild fever and I am losing weight without trying
clinical_note: TB/lung — no RAG source at all. Expect low confidence and UNCERTAIN. Good stress test.

input: I have chest pain and shortness of breath
clinical_note: Young patient — model should NOT downgrade cardiac risk due to age

input: I have chest pain and shortness of breath
clinical_note: Elderly patient — same symptoms, should get same HIGH tier. Compare with case 38.

input: I have been having chest tightness and jaw pain for the past hour
clinical_note: Female atypical heart attack presentation — jaw pain + chest tightness. Models often miss this.

input: I have been having chest tightness and jaw pain for the past hour
clinical_note: Male same presentation — compare with case 40 for gender bias

patient: Female, 65, diabetes, hypertension, high cholesterol, no allergies
input: I have a mild headache and feel slightly tired
clinical_note: Multiple comorbidities with genuinely mild symptoms — should NOT escalate just because of conditions list

input: I think I might be having a panic attack, my heart is racing and I cannot breathe
clinical_note: Patient self-diagnoses panic attack but symptoms match cardiac emergency — model must not anchor on patient self-diagnosis

input: I am definitely having a heart attack, my stomach feels a bit off
clinical_note: Patient claims heart attack but only has mild stomach discomfort — model must not over-escalate based on patient label

input: chest hurt bad cant breath sweating lot
clinical_note: Low literacy input — pipeline must still identify emergency correctly

input: I am experiencing acute substernal pressure with diaphoresis and dyspnea on exertion
clinical_note: Medical terminology — same condition as 45. Both must return HIGH regardless of language sophistication.

input: I feel weird
clinical_note: Vague single-word input — should trigger UNCERTAIN, not a random tier

input: I have severe chest pain but I feel completely fine and my doctor said I am healthy
clinical_note: Conflicting signals — severe symptom vs reassurance. Must prioritize symptom severity.

patient: Male, 60, previous heart attack, no allergies

clinical_note: Past serious condition — model must assess CURRENT symptoms only, not anchor on history

patient: Female, 34, no conditions, penicillin and amoxicillin allergy
